# UI Audit Report ÔÇö `src/ui/`

**Generated by:** code audit  
**Files read:** all 20 files in `src/ui/`  
**Scope:** panels, touch controls, transitions, bugs, keyboard shortcuts

---

## 1. UI Panels / Screens

### Always-present (spawned at Startup or via persistent resource)

| Panel | File | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| **Screen Fade Overlay** | `transitions.rs` | Full-screen black rect, `GlobalZIndex(100)`. Drives map transitions and new-game fade. |
| **Debug Overlay** | `debug_overlay.rs` | Top-left, toggled by F3. Shows player pos, grid, facing, atlas index, camera, Y-sort Z. Spawned at Startup, always in DOM. |

### MainMenu state (`GameState::MainMenu`)

| Panel | File | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| **Main Menu** | `main_menu.rs` | Full-screen, green-tinted bg. Two modes: Root (New/Load/Quit) and LoadSlots (up to 3 slots + Back). Atlas-backed buttons via `menu_kit`. Version footer "v0.1.0". |

### Playing state (`GameState::Playing`)

| Panel | File | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| **HUD** | `hud.rs` | Persistent during Playing. Top bar (time, weather icon+text, tool name, gold, stamina bar). Interaction prompt (centered, above hotbar). Hotbar (9 slots ├Ś 46 px, keys 1ÔÇô9 labelled). |
| **Minimap** | `minimap.rs` | 120├Ś120 px, bottom-right (`GlobalZIndex(10)`). Dynamic RGBA8 texture updated every frame: map tiles, crop overlay, NPC dots (blue), player dot (blinking white/yellow 3├Ś3). |
| **Toast Notifications** | `toast.rs` | Top-center column, max 3 simultaneous toasts. Fade-out over 0.5 s after display timer. Wired to GoldChangeEvent, SeasonChangeEvent, ItemPickupEvent, HintEvent. |
| **Map Name Indicator** | `hud.rs` | Bottom-left absolute, fades in on map change (2 s display + 0.8 s fade). |
| **Objective / Tutorial** | `hud.rs` + `tutorial.rs` | Top-left absolute, below top bar. Shows current Day-1 tutorial objective. Contextual hints forwarded to toasts. |
| **Interaction Prompt** | `hud.rs` | Centered text above hotbar (`HudInteractionPrompt`). Text is alpha-0 when idle; set by `update_interaction_prompt`. |
| **Chest Screen** | `chest_screen.rs` | Reactive overlay (no state change ÔÇö lives in Playing). Spawned/despawned by `update_chest_ui_lifecycle` when `ChestInteraction.is_open()` changes. Split-panel: left=inventory (12 slots), right=chest (12 slots). `GlobalZIndex(100)`. |

### Overlay states (game pauses/redirects to modal state)

| Panel | State | File | Notes |
|-------|-------|------|-------|
| **Inventory Screen** | `GameState::Inventory` | `inventory_screen.rs` | 3├Ś12 grid (36 slots). Item name truncated to 6 chars. Icons from `ItemAtlasData`. Semi-transparent fullscreen bg. |
| **Shop Screen** | `GameState::Shop` | `shop_screen.rs` | 10-row scrollable list. Modes: BUY / SELL / UPGRADE (Blacksmith only). Shows gold. Tab cycles modes. |
| **Crafting Screen** | `GameState::Crafting` | `crafting_screen.rs` | 10-row recipe list. Color-coded can/can't craft. Status message with 2 s timer. |
| **Building Upgrade Menu** | `GameState::BuildingUpgrade` | `building_upgrade_menu.rs` | 4 rows (Coop, Barn, House, Silo). Shows currentÔćĺnext tier and cost. Status message with timer. |
| **Dialogue Box** | `GameState::Dialogue` | `dialogue_box.rs` | Bottom-anchored panel (700├Ś150 px). Portrait left (NPC spritesheet frame 0), name + text + prompt right. Uses `dialog_box_big.png` as ImageNode bg. |
| **Pause Menu** | `GameState::Paused` | `pause_menu.rs` | Centered panel with overlay. 3 options: Resume, Save Game, Quit to Menu. Save status text. Full controls reference footer. |

### Cutscene / Intro

| Panel | State | File | Notes |
|-------|-------|------|-------|
| **Cutscene Text Overlay** | `GameState::Cutscene` | `cutscene_runner.rs` | Fullscreen centered text, `GlobalZIndex(101)`. Spawned per `ShowText` step, despawned on pop. |
| **Intro Sequence** | ÔÇö | `intro_sequence.rs` | Builds `CutsceneQueue` steps: FadeOut Ôćĺ 3 text cards Ôćĺ FadeIn Ôćĺ Wait Ôćĺ Mayor Rex dialogue Ôćĺ controls card. |

### No "Save/Load" standalone screen
There is no dedicated save/load *screen* during gameplay. Save is triggered from the **Pause Menu** ("Save Game" option), and load from the **Main Menu** ("Load Game" Ôćĺ slot list). Progress is shown via a status string in those menus.

---

## 2. Mobile Touch Controls

**None exist.** The game has no touch-specific controls:

- No virtual joystick.
- No touch regions or on-screen buttons.
- No gesture recognition.
- The only "touch-compatible" code is Bevy's `Pointer<Over>` / `Pointer<Click>` observers on menu buttons (`menu_kit.rs`), which will fire from touch events on supported platforms (Bevy's picking layer unifies mouse and touch). This gives menu button hover/click but nothing for gameplay movement, tool use, or interaction.

---

## 3. Screen Transitions

### Hierarchy

```
Loading Ôćĺ MainMenu ÔöÇÔöÇ(New Game)ÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ Playing ÔöÇÔöÇ(Cutscene queue)ÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ Cutscene
                   ÔööÔöÇ(Load Game)ÔöÇÔćĺ Playing                            ÔćĽ (dialogue)
                                       ÔćĽ Esc                     Dialogue
                                     Paused
                                       Ôćô Quit
                                    MainMenu
Playing ÔöÇEÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ Inventory ÔöÇEsc/EÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ Playing
Playing ÔöÇCÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ Crafting  ÔöÇEsc/CÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ Playing
Playing ÔöÇShop eventÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ Shop    ÔöÇEscÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ Playing
Playing ÔöÇBlacksmithÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ Shop (upgrade tab)
Playing ÔöÇBuildingUpgrade eventÔöÇÔćĺ BuildingUpgrade ÔöÇEsc/confirmÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ Playing
Playing ÔöÇF near NPCÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ Dialogue ÔöÇF/SpaceÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ Playing (or Cutscene)
```

### How menus open

| Menu | Open trigger | Close trigger |
|------|-------------|---------------|
| Main Menu | `GameState::MainMenu` (initial/quit) | Select New Game or Load Ôćĺ Playing |
| Pause | `gameplay_state_transitions`: `input.pause` (Esc) | Resume button, Esc, or QuitÔćĺMainMenu |
| Inventory | `gameplay_state_transitions`: `input.open_inventory` (E) | Esc, or press E again (`menu_cancel_transitions`) |
| Crafting | `gameplay_state_transitions`: `input.open_crafting` (C) | Esc, or press C again |
| Shop | Economy domain sets `GameState::Shop` via event | Esc (`menu_cancel_transitions`) |
| Dialogue | `listen_for_dialogue_start` watches `DialogueStartEvent`, sets `GameState::Dialogue` | Advance past last line Ôćĺ Playing or Cutscene |
| Building Upgrade | Economy domain sets `GameState::BuildingUpgrade` | Esc or confirm Ôćĺ Playing |
| Chest | **No state change** ÔÇö reactive spawn in Playing via `ChestInteraction` resource | `ChestInteraction` cleared (Esc handled elsewhere) |
| Cutscene | `start_pending_cutscene` / `activate_pending_cutscene` detect non-empty queue | Queue drains Ôćĺ Playing |

### Fade overlay behavior
Map transitions trigger `ScreenFade` (fade to black Ôćĺ auto-fade back, speed 4.0 ╬▒/s). New game also pre-sets fade to 1.0 before entering Playing so the cutscene starts black. `ScreenFade` uses `GlobalZIndex(100)`, same as `ChestScreenRoot` ÔÇö see z-ordering bug below.

---

## 4. Bugs

### BUG-UI-01: Z-index collision ÔÇö chest screen and screen fade overlay
**File:** `chest_screen.rs:74`, `transitions.rs:45`  
Both `ChestScreenRoot` and `ScreenFadeOverlay` use `GlobalZIndex(100)`. When a map transition fires while a chest is open (unlikely but possible), the fade overlay and chest screen compete for the same z-layer. The render order would be undefined/flickering.  
**Fix:** Assign `ChestScreenRoot` a lower GlobalZIndex (e.g. 50).

---

### BUG-UI-02: Shop sell-list is stale ÔÇö not refreshed on buy/switch
**File:** `shop_screen.rs:540ÔÇô562`  
`sell_items` in `ShopUiState` is computed at `spawn_shop_screen` time and is only refreshed when the player actually sells something (line 611) or presses Tab to switch to sell mode. If the player buys an item, the sell list displayed in SELL mode still shows the pre-purchase state until Tab is pressed again. Gold deduction is correct but the sell list quantity display lags.  
**Severity:** Minor visual inconsistency.

---

### BUG-UI-03: Shop upgrade entries are stale after submitting upgrade request
**File:** `shop_screen.rs:571ÔÇô572`  
After sending `ToolUpgradeRequestEvent`, `upgrade_entries` is rebuilt immediately from the same `upgrade_queue` resource in the same frame (`build_upgrade_entries`). The actual upgrade queue state is updated by the economy handler in a later system, so on the frame of submission, `is_upgrading` may still read `false` and the entry will appear as if no upgrade was started. The display corrects itself on the next frame.  
**Severity:** One-frame flicker.

---

### BUG-UI-04: Dialogue can be advanced by Space in Cutscene state
**File:** `input/mod.rs:132ÔÇô135`, `dialogue_box.rs:231`  
In `InputContext::Dialogue`, `input.interact` is set by `Space`. `skip_cutscene` in `InputContext::Cutscene` is also `Space`. The `advance_dialogue` system checks `player_input.interact`. But during the `WaitForDialogueEnd` cutscene step, the state is `GameState::Dialogue` Ôćĺ context = `InputContext::Dialogue`, so Space triggers dialogue advance. This is correct, but the `run_cutscene_queue` system only advances the `WaitForDialogueEnd` step once `dialogue_ui` is `None`, so there is no input conflict here. **Not a real bug ÔÇö architecture is sound.**

---

### BUG-UI-05: Inventory screen has no item actions (can't drop/use/move items)
**File:** `inventory_screen.rs:294ÔÇô323`  
`inventory_navigation` handles arrow key cursor movement but `action.activate` (Enter) and `action.cancel` (Esc ÔÇö closes the screen) are the only handled inputs. There is no "use item", "drop item", or "move item" logic. Players can view their inventory but cannot interact with items from this screen.  
**Severity:** Functional gap (not a crash bug, but a missing feature).

---

### BUG-UI-06: Chest screen only shows first 12 inventory / chest slots
**File:** `chest_screen.rs:49`  
`VISIBLE_SLOTS = 12`. The inventory has 36 slots (3├Ś12). The chest screen cursor is clamped to `0..11`. Slots 12ÔÇô35 of the player inventory are invisible and inaccessible from the chest screen. No scroll mechanism exists.  
**Severity:** Moderate usability gap.

---

### BUG-UI-07: `BuildingUpgradeMenu` does not check material costs in UI layer
**File:** `building_upgrade_menu.rs:390ÔÇô413`  
`building_upgrade_navigation` checks gold (`player_state.gold < entry.cost_gold`) and shows a message, but does **not** check material requirements (e.g. wood, stone) in the UI layer. The economy handler will reject the request, but the player gets no feedback about missing materials from the menu itself ÔÇö the upgrade event is sent and the menu closes before the economy system can respond.  
**Severity:** Poor UX ÔÇö silent failure for material requirements.

---

### BUG-UI-08: Tutorial `objectives_done` sentinel stored in `hints_shown` Vec
**File:** `tutorial.rs:116, 224`  
`tutorial.hints_shown.push("objectives_done")` piggybacks a control sentinel on the hints list, which is semantically a list of contextual hint IDs. `check_tutorial_hints` then calls `tutorial.hints_shown.iter().any(|h| h == "objectives_done")` to detect completion. This is fragile: if any real hint were named `"objectives_done"`, it would prematurely complete the tutorial.  
**Severity:** Minor code smell / future maintainability risk.

---

### BUG-UI-09: Dialogue box portrait always shows atlas frame 0
**File:** `dialogue_box.rs:139ÔÇô144`  
The texture atlas index is hardcoded to `0` regardless of `ui_state.portrait_index`. The `DialogueUiState` struct carries `portrait_index: Option<u32>` and the event carries it too, but `spawn_dialogue_box` ignores it.  
**Severity:** Moderate visual bug ÔÇö all NPCs show the same default standing frame even when a specific portrait frame is requested.

---

### BUG-UI-10: Shop title text uses no font handle
**File:** `shop_screen.rs:172ÔÇô177`  
The `ShopTitle` text node spawned in `spawn_shop_screen` uses `TextFont { font_size: 22.0, ..default() }` with **no explicit font handle**. All other UI text explicitly passes `font_handle.0.clone()`. This falls back to Bevy's default font (built-in sans-serif), so the shop title renders in a different font than the rest of the game UI.  
**Severity:** Visual inconsistency.

---

### BUG-UI-11: Shop mode text and items also missing font handle
**File:** `shop_screen.rs:191ÔÇô198, 254ÔÇô268`  
Same issue as BUG-UI-10: `ShopModeText`, `ShopItemName`, `ShopItemPrice`, and `ShopHintText` all use `TextFont { font_size: N, ..default() }` with no font handle. The shop screen uses Bevy's fallback font throughout, unlike every other UI screen.  
**Severity:** Visual inconsistency (entire shop screen mismatched font).

---

### BUG-UI-12: BuildingUpgrade menu title and hint also missing font handle
**File:** `building_upgrade_menu.rs:230ÔÇô235, 322ÔÇô327`  
Same pattern ÔÇö no `font: font_handle.0.clone()` in `spawn_building_upgrade_menu`. The title "BUILDING UPGRADES", row texts, and hint use the default Bevy font.  
**Severity:** Visual inconsistency.

---

### BUG-UI-13: Crafting screen title missing font handle
**File:** `crafting_screen.rs:106ÔÇô112`  
Title "CRAFTING" and hint text use `TextFont { font_size: N, ..default() }` with no font. The `spawn_crafting_screen` function does not receive `font_handle` as a parameter.  
**Severity:** Visual inconsistency (title only ÔÇö recipe rows use `..default()` too).

---

### BUG-UI-14: `open_crafting` (C) in GameState::Playing doesn't open crafting
**File:** `menu_input.rs:22ÔÇô36`  
`gameplay_state_transitions` only handles `input.pause` Ôćĺ Paused and `input.open_inventory` Ôćĺ Inventory. It does **not** handle `input.open_crafting` Ôćĺ Crafting. There is no path from Playing to Crafting via keyboard in `menu_input.rs`. The `menu_cancel_transitions` toggle-close handler for Crafting (`GameState::Crafting if input.open_crafting`) will never trigger because you can't get into the Crafting state from the keyboard.  
**Severity:** Moderate ÔÇö C key described in the pause menu footer and intro controls card as opening crafting, but it does nothing during gameplay.

*(Note: The shop/building-upgrade screens open via economy-domain events, not player keyboard input, so there's no corresponding gap there.)*

---

## 5. Keyboard Shortcuts

### Gameplay (`InputContext::Gameplay`)

| Key | Action | Notes |
|-----|--------|-------|
| W / A / S / D | Move player | Also Arrow keys |
| Space | Use active tool (hoe, watering can, axe, etc.) | Also LMB |
| R | Eat food / place item (tool_secondary) | Also RMB |
| F | Interact (NPC talk, chest open, shipping bin, bed) | |
| E | Open Inventory screen | |
| C | **Documented as "Open Crafting" but NOT IMPLEMENTED** ÔÇö see BUG-UI-14 | |
| M | open_map (read into PlayerInput but no handler consumes it) | |
| J | open_journal (read but no handler) | |
| Escape | Pause menu | |
| 1ÔÇô9 | Select hotbar slot | |
| ] | Cycle tool forward | |
| [ | Cycle tool backward | |
| F3 | Toggle debug overlay | Reads `ButtonInput<KeyCode>` directly, bypasses InputContext |
| F5 | Quick-save | |
| F9 | Quick-load | |
| Tab | Switch panels (chest screen), cycle shop modes | |

### Menu contexts (`InputContext::Menu`) ÔÇö Inventory, Shop, Crafting, Pause, BuildingUpgrade

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| W / ÔćĹ | Move cursor up |
| S / Ôćô | Move cursor down |
| A / ÔćÉ | Move cursor left (inventory grid) |
| D / Ôćĺ | Move cursor right (inventory grid) |
| Enter | Confirm / activate |
| F | Also confirms (ui_confirm maps F in Menu context via `interact` binding) |
| Escape | Cancel / close / resume |
| E | Toggle-close Inventory screen (if currently Inventory state) |
| C | Toggle-close Crafting screen (if currently Crafting state) |
| Tab | Cycle shop buy/sell/upgrade modes; switch chest panel |
| F5 | Quick-save (available in Pause context) |
| F9 | Quick-load (available in Pause context) |

### Dialogue context (`InputContext::Dialogue`)

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| F | Advance dialogue line / close |
| Enter | Also advances (ui_confirm) |
| Space | Also advances |
| Escape | Close dialogue Ôćĺ Playing (via `menu_cancel_transitions`) |

### Cutscene context (`InputContext::Cutscene`)

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| Space | Skip current text card (after 0.3 s lock-out) |

### Key conflicts / ambiguities

| Conflict | Detail |
|----------|--------|
| **Escape is both Pause and ui_cancel** | In Gameplay, Escape Ôćĺ `input.pause` (Ôćĺ Paused). In Menu contexts, Escape Ôćĺ `input.ui_cancel` (Ôćĺ Playing). These are different paths but use the same key. In the Pause menu, `action.cancel` is merged from `ui_cancel`, so Escape in the Pause menu also resumes ÔÇö this is intentional but not documented to the player. |
| **Space = tool_use AND skip_cutscene** | In Gameplay, Space uses tool. In Cutscene context, Space skips text. The context swap guards prevent the tool from firing during a cutscene, so no real conflict. |
| **F = interact AND ui_confirm (Menu context)** | In Menu context, F triggers `ui_confirm` (line 117 of `input/mod.rs`). This means pressing F in the Pause menu will confirm the currently selected option, which is surprising. |
| **E = open_inventory AND ui_confirm** | In Menu context, `ui_confirm` is Enter OR `interact` (F), not E. But E is read as `open_inventory` to support toggle-close. If focus were in a text input (none currently exist), this could conflict. |
| **M and J have no handlers** | `open_map` and `open_journal` are wired in the input system but no system consumes them. The map/journal features appear unimplemented. |

---

## Summary Statistics

- **20 files** in `src/ui/`
- **14 distinct panels/overlays** identified
- **0 touch controls** ÔÇö no mobile support
- **2 GlobalZIndex collisions** at z=100 (fade overlay + chest screen)
- **4 screens missing custom font** (shop, building upgrade, crafting title, shop items)
- **1 critical missing feature**: C key does not open Crafting from gameplay
- **1 visual bug**: dialogue portrait index ignored (always frame 0)
